title: Skills Registry
description: Registry of installed skills ($XDG_CONFIG_HOME/smartcrab-skills/skills.json). This file is managed by the skills CLI; do not edit by hand.

name.description: Unique skill name within the registry.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit hash. null means the default branch was used.

commit.description: Full commit SHA resolved at install time.

scope.description: Whether the skill is installed globally or for a specific project.

project_path.description: Absolute path of the project root for project-scoped skills. null for global.

method.description: How the skill files are deployed to the agent directory.

agents.description: Agent names this skill is deployed to.

store_path.description: Absolute path to the master copy in the store directory.
